I thought its just me who's idea of relationship is different

This guy put it so beautifully

My dear,
Find what you love and let it kill you. Let it drain from you your all. Let it cling onto your back and weigh you down into eventual nothingness. Let it kill you, and let it devour your remains.
For all things will kill you, both slowly and fastly, but it's much better to be killed by a lover.
Falsely yours
I have read this somewhere, insta shayad

He still visits me, with his pain, pleasure... Everything... Even today when I look at him, I feel I am looking at a distant star... It's dazzling, but the light is from tens of thousands of years ago. Maybe the star doesn't even exist anymore.... Yet... Sometimes that lights seems to be more real that anything to me...
For the him the sadist... I will always be the only masochist....

I still sleep on my side of the bed,
Sniffing at your pillow,
Time and again...
Even before my eyes open...
The sharp strips of the sun
Have failed to wake me this summer,
I have been spoiled by the way your voice used to....

text:
I don't seek permanence now, it the beauty of destruction that I am learning to admire.
I love to see you break every bit of yourself.
I love to see you collecting all your pieces just to shatter again.
I find you entering a world just to leave it again alluring.
I have fallen in love with your weeps.
I jump a little seeing your bubble burst.
I adulate you now getting addicted to dark.
I cherish you killing yourself a little More everyday.
I enjoy seeing you destroy another permanence now.
I see you puncture another soul now.
I have a sigh of relief seeing you leave deeper marks than you could ever have.
I love your strong body desperately trying to cover your weak heart.
You Now cry yourself to sleep every night.
You comfort yourself with lies now.
You're now killing yourself to build yourself again.
You're destroying everything around you,
Because destruction now soothes you too.

You're destroying everything around you,
Because destruction now soothes you too.

text:
If there's one thing I could take back, that would be giving you the words I could write. If there's one thing I could say, that would be all about you. If there's one thing I could regret, that would be letting someone else have you..It has been one hell of a heartache to keep my feelings written, instead of telling you...I should know how to express myself to you but I don't know why I'm wordless every time we talk..maybe to avoid myself from confessing that I like you.
Yes, I like you.
I liked you from the moment we started talking. You are more than what you think. You are so much more than what i show. My feeling is one-sided, I know, but I'm tired of hiding everything worth sharing.
I know there's no chance we can be together. We can only be friends. I could only give you pieces of advice. I could only offer you comfort. I could never love you the way you deserve to be loved.
This new summer, if there's one thing I could wish it would be to be finally free of you. I'm tired. I'm tired of loving you. I'm tired of writing words that only talk about you. I'm tired of giving you my words, my heart. And if you ever read this some time, I hope you realize who you are. I hope you realize I wrote about you a little too often. I hope you realize that the girl who likes breaking rules included you along the lines she wrote in her poetry.
But by the time you do, it will be too late. Your heart already belongs to someone else. And I will be ready to stop writing about you.
But the more I write this letter, the more I realize some things. I realized that I've already learned to deal with the pain of loving someone who can't return the feelings and that my feelings for you might stay for a very long time, perhaps until I stop writing. And that means, forever.
Yes, I like you. And you should have known.
The girl who loved.

text:
Ouch dude mujhe hurt hua happyy birthday cutest and the one person who means a lot to me ❤  enjoy your day have a blast 😘the girl who idk when came so close to my heart . An understanding,supportive,caring, loving pure soul. thanks for always standing by me n supporting me always and taking so much care with so much affection.within a very short span of time we have got soo close that we can recognise each others situations even by talking ,with u I always love to smile n I always try to make u smile coz ur smile is one in millions . You know very well that not many understand you like the way i do even before you say something i know it because ya i genuinely care for you ,i love spending time with u ,our talks ,jokes,tera gana gana ,our car drives,teri gandi playlist ,sab kuch n ur care for me forces me to be with you always . I'm always there for u anytime ,anywhere ,anything never feel lonely coz even in the worst situations u can rely upon me n I promise you I won't leave u ever ,n whenever u would need me I'll be with u ,we  I'll never stop loving n caring you coz u really special to me n play an integral part in my life . That beautiful smile on your face and the sparkle in your lovely eyes when your lame talks almost make me sucidal are really special for me. This love makes me feel really special and thanks for giving meaning to the word a 'friend'. Thanks for Exsisting.its just sudden realisation that i told you i havent met someone like you in my 20 years and i swear by that at start i hated you but latee could only see myself in you.you are a gem and pure soul a person with whom i can litreally share anything with,the one understands me to and forth without even spending that much time,i guess its a unbreakable bond ill cherish for life and smile that i met Anisha Gupta.without meeting daily it feels like i know you since ages and trust me i feel the most comfortable with you after my mom and dad so ya theres a lot to say but our bond says it all abhi kafi time hai sath aagey tak kuch batey rahengi par ik jab bhi milenge wahi purani yari rahegi.honestly its only you whom ill put efforts to stop if a day comes to forget you.  i wish I could tell you exactly how I feel about you but then I'd have to write a novel and that can be hard to read on your phone.If I try to tell you how much I love you, we'll only end up spending the day talking. So I'll save my expressions for another tender moment and sum it up for you in three simple words – dude loveee you💖 keep smiling loveeeee uuuuu sooo muchhh 💕
You also know.my love for you and admit it meri flirting pe marti hai tu🙃
happpyyyy birthdayyyy my gem❤❤💋
